recommendations.title: The Bouncer
recommendations.overview: A tough nightclub bouncer struggling to raise his 8-year-old daughter is forced to go undercover after an unfortunate event.

recommendations.title: Earth and Blood
recommendations.overview: A sawmill owner and his teenage daughter become tangled in a deadly feud when a drug dealer stashes stolen cocaine on their remote property.

recommendations.title: The Crew
recommendations.overview: One of the members of a gang of thieves commits a serious mistake that force them to work for a ruthless gang of drug dealers, endangering the future of the team, their lives and those of their families.

recommendations.title: The Wages of Fear
recommendations.overview: When an explosion at an oil well threatens hundreds of lives, a crack team is called upon to make a deadly desert crossing with nitroglycerine in tow.

recommendations.title: Sentinelle
recommendations.overview: Transferred home after a traumatizing combat mission, a highly trained French soldier uses her lethal skills to hunt down the man who hurt her sister.

recommendations.title: Die Hard 2
recommendations.overview: One year after his heroics in Los Angeles, John McClane is an off-duty cop who is the wrong guy in the wrong place at the wrong time. On a snowy Christmas Eve, as he waits for his wife's plane to land at Washington Dulles International Airport, terro

recommendations.title: The Taking of Pelham One Two Three
recommendations.overview: In New York, armed men hijack a subway car and demand a ransom for the passengers while the authorities question about the method of their escape.

recommendations.title: 7 Days in Entebbe
recommendations.overview: In 1976, four hijackers take over an Air France airplane en route from Tel Aviv to Paris and force it to land in Entebbe, Uganda. With 248 passengers on board, one of the most daring rescue missions ever is set in motion.

recommendations.title: Blood Red Sky
recommendations.overview: A woman with a mysterious illness is forced into action when a group of terrorists attempt to hijack a transatlantic overnight flight. In order to protect her son she will have to reveal a dark secret, and unleash the inner monster she has fought to

recommendations.title: She Walks in Darkness
recommendations.overview: A young agent leaves everything behind to pose as a member of ETA, risking her life to uncover the terrorists' hideouts in the south of France.
